title: vi's Wynn Edit
description: Wynncraft GUI Edit in a red/orange/gold & autumn theme.
body:
![title name for pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b858f565bdfb59e127c417d140877e99e1e64bfa.png)

# A Red/Orange/Gold & Autumn Wynncraft GUI theme that also retextures the Wynntils GUI.
This pack was made mostly for personal use, apologies if some textures are not to your liking.

![inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16c8bdcc24b38dce343d1e9fefc203828131893d.png)                            
            ![hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b045c07f9a1db339412e34dda79714c3b0bf2f3b.png)   

# Requirements

Requires "Server Pack Unlocker" to use on Wynncraft, place this pack above the default server resource pack.

Texture pack changes a bit more than the UI, some items are edited.

Inspired by brilliantknight's Stone Tablet Theme. (deprecated)

IF YOU EXPERIENCE ISSUES WITH GUI ELEMENTS NOT APPEARING, TRY F3 + T FIRST.

If you encounter any issues, or would like to provide feedback, contact me on discord: @2four6
